growth_records.strain: LPK7 (delta ldhA, delta pflB, delta pta, delta ackA)
growth_records.medium: Glucose-based medium with CO2 (composition not stated in review)
growth_records.cite: Yujin Cao et al. Fermentative Succinate Production: An Emerging Technology to Replace the Traditional Petrochemical Processes. BioMed Research International (2013). DOI:10.1155/2013/723412. [PMC3874355]
growth_records.snippet: Mannheimia succiniciproducens | LPK7 | delta ldhA, delta pflB, delta pta, delta ackA | Fed-batch | 52.4 g/L, 1.16 mol/mol glucose | [50]
growth_records.notes: REVIEW-COMPILED, secondhand from Table 2, cited from primary ref [50]. Succinate 52.4 g/L (endpoint), molar yield 1.16 mol/mol glucose. M. succiniciproducens = facultative anaerobe (Table 1). No growth rate/medium/T/pH in review.
